title: Apex
tmdbOverview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.
synopsis: Apex (2026) is a action and thriller film from United States. It carries a 6.1 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
